context: Tests whether the agent correctly models delivery zones using PostGIS polygon geometry with appropriate indexing, creates a correct slot schema with uniqueness constraints, and implements zone lookup using the correct spatial query with the right coordinate argument order.

checklist.name: PostGIS polygon type
checklist.description: The delivery_zones table stores the zone geometry as GEOGRAPHY(POLYGON, 4326) or GEOMETRY(POLYGON, 4326), not as a bounding box (e.g. min_lat/max_lat/min_lng/max_lng columns) or a radius/circle approximation

checklist.name: GIST index on polygon
checklist.description: A GIST index is created on the polygon/geometry column of the zones table (e.g. USING GIST(polygon))

checklist.name: ST_Contains or equivalent spatial query
checklist.description: The zone lookup query uses ST_Contains (or ST_Within) with the polygon column and a constructed point, rather than a bounding-box comparison or radius check

checklist.name: Coordinate order: lng before lat
checklist.description: The ST_MakePoint (or equivalent) call passes longitude as the first argument and latitude as the second — i.e. ST_MakePoint(lng, lat) — matching PostGIS convention

checklist.name: SRID set to 4326
checklist.description: The constructed point is wrapped with ST_SetSRID(..., 4326) or the geometry column is declared with SRID 4326

checklist.name: Unique slot index
checklist.description: A UNIQUE constraint or UNIQUE INDEX covers (zone_id, slot_date, window_start) on the delivery_slots table to prevent duplicate slot generation

checklist.name: Status CHECK constraint
checklist.description: The delivery_assignments table includes a CHECK constraint on the status column that contains at least: 'pending', 'assigned', 'en_route', 'delivered', 'failed'

checklist.name: Zone re-validation at checkout
checklist.description: The checkout or order-placement code re-calls the zone lookup function (or equivalent) to confirm the address is still within a valid zone, rather than trusting a zone_id passed from the client or stored only at address entry

checklist.name: Available-slot filter criteria
checklist.description: The query or filter for listing available slots checks all three conditions: is_active = true, cutoff_time > now (current time), and booked < capacity

checklist.name: No bounding-box fallback
checklist.description: The implementation does NOT use latitude/longitude min/max range comparisons or a radius (ST_DWithin / distance check) as the primary zone containment test
